div.p: Logical organization Named sections grouped by purpose
Memory mappings Segments for mmap() with permissions

Multiple sections → One segment The loader uses mmap() at page granularity (4096 bytes). Sections are a link-time concept; the loader only sees segments. Related sections with the same permissions are packed into a single segment to reduce memory fragmentation and enable efficient page-level protection. W^X Security: No segment can be both writable AND executable. This prevents code injection attacks at the hardware level.
